title: stelis nagelii
intro: Stelis nagelii, also known as Nageli's stelis, is a flowering orchid native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Stelis nagelii include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Stelis nagelii typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which are said to have various therapeutic applications.
